title: Problems encountered when using the right join elt function together
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(c1 Int32 DEFAULT 0) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY c1;
CREATE TABLE t3(c2 String DEFAULT 'default') ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY c2;

SELECT t3.c2, CASE t2.c1 WHEN 0 THEN 'zero' WHEN 1 THEN 'one' WHEN 2 THEN 'two' ELSE NULL END AS el FROM t2 RIGHT JOIN t3 ON t2.c1 = length(t3.c2) WHERE CASE t2.c1 WHEN 0 THEN 'zero' ELSE NULL END IS NULL;
key_bug_features: RIGHT JOIN with ELT function on NULL values
